violations.description: Lighting. — --Existing light fixtures * did not provide adequate illumination. - Lighting in the grill area is dim. There is one light that is not working and other bulbs that are working but dim.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface * was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. - cutting boards on the two prep tables have deep knife cuts and pitting that prevents that cutting boards to be properly cleaned.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. - clean in place equipment not cleaned adequately. - Shelves and cabinet faces not cleaned.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vent hood filters require a more frequent cleaning.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. - Dishwashing machine and area around not cleaned adequately.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil * was not covered or inverted during storage. - Plates were observed to have residual cleaning chemical or hard water spots on them. these plates are stored face up, collecting dust.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors and walls in the kitchen require a more frequent and more thorough cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. - Flooring in the kitchen needs repaired.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
